name: Shrimp Quiche with Rice Crust
recipeIngredient: 1 cup diced red bell peppers and onions
6 ounces thawed frozen "ready to serve" shrimp
recipeInstructions:
To Prepare Crust: Preheat oven to 425°F. Spray a 9-inch quiche dish. Combine all ingredients for the crust and press over the bottom and up the sides. Bake until firm and lightly browned, about 25 minutes. Remove from oven and set aside. Reduce temperature to 375°F.
To Prepare Filling: In a small skillet, heat margarine until bubbly and hot. Add peppers, onions, and garlic. Saute, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are tender. Transfer to a medium bowl; add the remaining ingredients for the filling and stir to combine. Spoon into prepared crust.
To Prepare Topping and Bake: In a small skillet, heat margarine until bubbly and hot; add bread crumbs and stir to combine. Sprinkle crumbs evenly over filling and bake until the filling has set, 30 to 35 minutes. Remove quiche from oven and let stand for 10 minutes.
